function refreshButtonColor()
    if value_noMerge_object == 1 then
        self.UI.setAttribute('merge_object', 'color', '#33FF33')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('merge_object', 'color', '#FF6666')
    end
    if value_initial_nohand == 1 then
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_nohand', 'color', '#33FF33')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_nohand', 'color', '#FF6666')
    end
    if value_initial_hidden == 1 then
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_hidden', 'color', '#33FF33')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_hidden', 'color', '#FF6666')
    end
    if settingLocation == 1 then
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_locationmipple', 'color', '#FF6666')
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_locationmipple', 'text', '설정 완료')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_locationmipple', 'color', '#FFFF44')
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_locationmipple', 'text', '토큰 스폰 지점 설정')
    end
    if value_allowingGiving == 1 then
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_allowgiving', 'color', '#33FF33')
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_allowgiving', 'text', '토큰 양도 가능함')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_allowgiving', 'color', '#FF6666')
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_allowgiving', 'text', '토큰 양도 불가능함')
    end
    if value_restrictMore == 1 then
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_restrictMore', 'color', '#33FF33')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_restrictMore', 'color', '#FF6666')
    end
    if value_colorRestriction == 1 then
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_colorRestriction', 'color', '#33FF33')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('make_colorRestriction', 'color', '#FF6666')
    end

end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    TAwarn = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end
    refreshButtonColor()
    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function openTokenConfig(player_color, position, object)
    TAwarn = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end
    if self.UI.getAttribute('configTokenUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configTokenUI', 'active', 'true')
        self.UI.setAttribute('tokenif_Black', 'text', tokenImgUrl['Black'])
        self.UI.setAttribute('tokenifScale', 'text', tostring(tokenScale))
        self.UI.setAttribute('previewToken_Black', 'image', tokenImgUrl['Black'])
        for i = 1, 10 do
            self.UI.setAttribute('tokenif_'..colorList[i], 'text', tokenImgUrl[colorList[i]])
            self.UI.setAttribute('previewToken_'..colorList[i], 'image', tokenImgUrl[colorList[i]])
        end
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configTokenUI', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    if string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'CHESTER_LOCATION:') then
        object.destroyObject()
        return false
    end
    if registering == 1 then
        if string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            return false
        end

        local tmppos = self.getPosition() + (self.getTransformRight() * 4.5)
        local tmppc
        tmppos.y = tmppos.y + 1
        
        object.addTag('ChesterCard')
        object.setLuaScript(LUA_SCRIPT)
        broadcastToAll(object.guid .. ' 카드에 스크립트를 등록했습니다.')
        if value_initial_hidden == 1 then
            object.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
        else
            object.setHiddenFrom({})
        end
        if value_initial_nohand == 1 then
            object.use_hands = false
        else
            object.use_hands = true
        end
        
        tmppc = nil
        if Player['Black'].seated == true then
            tmppc = 'Black'
        else
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                    tmppc = colorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        if tmppc ~= nil then
            Player[tmppc].pingTable(tmppos)
        end
        Wait.frames(function()
            object.setPositionSmooth(tmppos, false, false)
            object.call('setIsHidden', value_initial_hidden)
        end, 10)
        return false
    else
        return false
    end
end

function setRegisterMode(player_color, position, object)
    TAwarn = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if registering == 0 then
        registering = 1
        self.UI.setAttribute('registering', 'active', 'true')
        broadcastToAll('카드 등록을 시작합니다. 등록하고 싶은 카드를 주머니 위에 두세요.')
    else
        registering = 0
        self.UI.setAttribute('registering', 'active', 'false')
        broadcastToAll('카드 등록이 완료되었습니다.')
    end
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'merge_object' then
        if value_noMerge_object == 1 then
            value_noMerge_object = 0
        else
            value_noMerge_object = 1
        end
    elseif id == 'make_nohand' then
        if value_initial_nohand == 1 then
            value_initial_nohand = 0
        else
            value_initial_nohand = 1
        end
    elseif id == 'make_hidden' then
        if value_initial_hidden == 1 then
            value_initial_hidden = 0
        else
            value_initial_hidden = 1
        end
    elseif id == 'make_allowgiving' then
        if value_allowingGiving == 1 then
            value_allowingGiving = 0
        else
            value_allowingGiving = 1
        end
    elseif id == 'make_restrictMore' then
        if value_restrictMore == 1 then
            value_restrictMore = 0
        else
            value_restrictMore = 1
        end
    elseif id == 'make_colorRestriction' then
        if value_colorRestriction == 1 then
            value_colorRestriction = 0
        else
            value_colorRestriction = 1
        end
    elseif id == 'make_locationmipple' then
        setTokenSpawnLocation()
    elseif id == 'close_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
    refreshButtonColor()
end

function btclick2(player, value, id)
    if id == 'close_configToken' then
        openTokenConfig('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function getValueNoMergeObject()
    return value_noMerge_object
end

function getValueInitialHidden()
    return value_initial_hidden
end

function getValueInitialNohand()
    return value_initial_nohand
end

function getValueAllowingGiving()
    return value_allowingGiving
end

function getRestrictMore()
    return value_restrictMore
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return value_colorRestriction
end

function spawnLocationMipple(color, input_position)
    local tmppos = self.getPosition()
    tmppos.y = tmppos.y + 2
    local object = spawnObject({
        type = "PlayerPawn",
        position = tmppos,
        scale = {tokenScale*3.6, tokenScale*3.6, tokenScale*3.6},
        sound = false
    })
    object.setColorTint(colorV[color])
    object.setPositionSmooth(input_position, false, false)
    object.setGMNotes('CHESTER_LOCATION:' .. color)
    return object
end

function spawnLocationMipples()
    local tmppos = self.getPosition()
    tmppos.x = tmppos.x - 3 - (tokenScale * 3.2) - (tokenScale * 3.2)
    tmppos.y = tmppos.y + 1.5
    tmppos.z = tmppos.z + (tokenScale * 3.2 * 2)
    for i = 1, 5 do
        spawnLocationMipple(colorList[i], tmppos)
        tmppos.z = tmppos.z - (tokenScale * 3.2)
    end
    tmppos.x = tmppos.x + (tokenScale * 3.2)
    tmppos.z = self.getPosition().z + (tokenScale * 3.2 * 2)
    for i = 1, 5 do
        spawnLocationMipple(colorList[i+5], tmppos)
        tmppos.z = tmppos.z - (tokenScale * 3.2)
    end
end

function setTokenSpawnLocation()
    if settingLocation == 0 then
        broadcastToAll('토큰 스폰 지점을 설정합니다.')
        settingLocation = 1
        refreshButtonColor()
        for i = 1, 10 do
            value_pList[colorList[i]][1] = 0
            value_pList[colorList[i]][2] = {0, 0, 0}
        end
        spawnLocationMipples()
    else
        settingLocation = 0
        refreshButtonColor()
        local pnum = 0
        for i = 1, 10 do
            local mipple = findObjectWithGMNotes('CHESTER_LOCATION:'..colorList[i])
            if mipple ~= nil then
                value_pList[colorList[i]][1] = 1
                value_pList[colorList[i]][2] = mipple.getPosition()
                mipple.destroyObject()
                pnum = pnum + 1
            end
        end
        broadcastToAll(tostring(pnum) .. '개의 토큰 스폰 지점 설정이 완료되었습니다.')
    end
end

function spawnTokenToAll()
    TAwarn = 0
    if Soundbox ~= nil then
        Soundbox.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(1)
    end
    local inipos = self.getPosition()
    inipos.y = inipos.y + 2
    for i = 1, 10 do
        if value_pList[colorList[i]][1] == 1 then
            local tnum = 0
            local tobj = getObjects()
            for j = 1, #tobj do
                if tobj[j].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..colorList[i] then
                    tnum = tnum + 1
                end
            end
            local tpos = {x = value_pList[colorList[i]][2].x,
            y = value_pList[colorList[i]][2].y,
            z = value_pList[colorList[i]][2].z}
            tpos.y = tpos.y + (0.196 * tnum)
            local spawned = spawnObjectJSON({
                json = JSON.encode({
                    Name = 'Custom_Tile',
                    Transform = {
                        posX = inipos.x,
                        posY = inipos.y,
                        posZ = inipos.z,
                        rotX = 0,
                        rotY = 180,
                        rotZ = 0,
                        scaleX = tokenScale,
                        scaleY = 1.0,
                        scaleZ = tokenScale
                    },
                    Tags = {'ChesterToken'},
                    CustomImage = {
                        ImageURL = tokenImgUrl[colorList[i]],
                        ImageSecondaryURL = '',
                        CustomTile = {Thickness=0.15, Type='Circle'}
                    }
                })
            })
            spawned.setGMNotes('Token:'..colorList[i])
            spawned.setColorTint(colorList[i])
            Wait.frames(function()
                setTokenScript(spawned)
                spawned.setRotationSmooth({0, 180, 0}, false, false)
                spawned.setPositionSmooth(tpos, false, false)
            end, 10)
        end
    end
end

function spawnTokenToColor(color)
    TAwarn = 0
    if Soundbox ~= nil then
        Soundbox.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(1)
    end
    local inipos = self.getPosition()
    inipos.y = inipos.y + 2
    local tnum = 0
    local tobj = getObjects()
    for j = 1, #tobj do
        if tobj[j].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..color then
            tnum = tnum + 1
        end
    end
    local tpos
    if color == 'Black' then
        tpos = inipos
    elseif value_pList[color][1] == 1 then
        tpos = {x = value_pList[color][2].x,
        y = value_pList[color][2].y,
        z = value_pList[color][2].z}
        tpos.y = tpos.y + (0.196 * tnum)
    else
        tpos = inipos
        tpos.z = tpos.z - 3
    end
    local spawned = spawnObjectJSON({
        json = JSON.encode({
            Name = 'Custom_Tile',
            Transform = {
                posX = inipos.x,
                posY = inipos.y,
                posZ = inipos.z,
                rotX = 0,
                rotY = 180,
                rotZ = 0,
                scaleX = tokenScale,
                scaleY = 1.0,
                scaleZ = tokenScale
            },
            Tags = {'ChesterToken'},
            CustomImage = {
                ImageURL = tokenImgUrl[color],
                ImageSecondaryURL = '',
                CustomTile = {Thickness=0.15, Type='Circle'}
            }
        })
    })
    spawned.setGMNotes('Token:'..color)
    spawned.setColorTint(color)
    Wait.frames(function()
        setTokenScript(spawned)
        spawned.setRotation({0, 180, 0})
        spawned.setPositionSmooth(tpos, false, false)
    end, 10)
end

function dealButton1(obj, color, alt)
    if alt == true then return end
    if color == 'Black' then
        if self.UI.getAttribute('givingTokenUI', 'active') == 'false' then
            self.UI.setAttribute('givingTokenUI', 'active', 'true')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute('givingTokenUI', 'active', 'false')
        end
    else
        broadcastToAll(color..' 플레이어가 토큰 1개를 발급받았습니다.')
        spawnTokenToColor(color)
    end
end

function dealButton2(obj, color, alt)
    if alt == true then return end
    spawnTokenToAll()
end

function findObjectWithGMNotes(inputGMNotes)
    local t = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #t do
        if t[i].getGMNotes() == inputGMNotes then
            return t[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function takeListAdd(inputTable)
    if inputTable.input_cardName == nil or inputTable.input_cardName == '' or inputTable.input_pColor == 'Black' then
        return
    end
    if string.find(cardTakeList[inputTable.input_pColor], inputTable.input_cardName) == nil then
        cardTakeList[inputTable.input_pColor] = cardTakeList[inputTable.input_pColor] .. "#" .. inputTable.input_cardName .. "#"
    end
end

function tookSameCardAlready(inputTable)
    if inputTable.input_cardName == nil or inputTable.input_cardName == '' or inputTable.input_pColor == 'Black' then
        return 0
    end
    if string.find(cardTakeList[inputTable.input_pColor], "#" .. inputTable.input_cardName .. "#") then
        return 1
    else
        return 0
    end
end

function initializePhase()
    TAwarn = 0
    for i = 1, 10 do
        cardTakeList[colorList[i]] = ''
    end
end

function setCardAvailable(str_name)
    local objs = getObjectsWithTag('ChesterCard')
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].call('getCardName') == str_name then
            objs[i].call('setAvailable', true)
        end
    end
end

function setCardUnavailable(str_name)
    local objs = getObjectsWithTag('ChesterCard')
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].call('getCardName') == str_name then
            objs[i].call('setAvailable', false)
        end
    end
end

function table_contains(tbl, value)
    for _, v in ipairs(tbl) do
        if v == value then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

function allowGettingCard(player_color, position, object)
    TAwarn = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end
    local objs = getObjectsWithTag('ChesterCard')
    local nameList = {}
    local tmpstr
    for i = 1, #objs do
        tmpstr = objs[i].call('getCardName')
        if tmpstr ~= '' then
            if table_contains(nameList, tmpstr) == false then
                nameList[(#nameList + 1)] = tmpstr
            end
        end
    end
    if #nameList > 0 then
        Player[player_color].showOptionsDialog('획득 허용할 카드 종류 이름', nameList, 1, function(text, index, player_color)
            setCardAvailable(text)
        end)
    end
end

function preventGettingCard(player_color, position, object)
    TAwarn = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end
    local objs = getObjectsWithTag('ChesterCard')
    local nameList = {}
    local tmpstr
    for i = 1, #objs do
        tmpstr = objs[i].call('getCardName')
        if tmpstr ~= '' then
            if table_contains(nameList, tmpstr) == false then
                nameList[(#nameList + 1)] = tmpstr
            end
        end
    end
    if #nameList > 0 then
        Player[player_color].showOptionsDialog('획득 제한할 카드 종류 이름', nameList, 1, function(text, index, player_color)
            setCardUnavailable(text)
        end)
    end
end

function tokenEndEdit(player, value, id)
    if id == 'tokenifScale' then
        local arith = tonumber(value)
        if arith == nil then
            self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', tostring(tokenScale))
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
            tokenScale = arith
        end
    else
        if string.find(value, 'http') then
            local tColor = string.gsub(id, 'tokenif_', '')
            self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
            tokenImgUrl[tColor] = value
            self.UI.setAttribute('previewToken_'..tColor, 'image', tokenImgUrl[tColor])
        end
    end
end

function decodeCondition(str, condition)
    -- condition= 와 ; 사이의 문자열 추출
    local pattern = condition .. "=([^;]+)"
    local matched = str:match(pattern)
    
    if not matched then
        return {nCondition = 0, code = {}, value = {}}
    end
    
    -- 쉼표로 분리
    local items = {}
    for item in matched:gmatch("[^,]+") do
        table.insert(items, item)
    end
    
    local codes = {}
    local values = {}
    
    -- 각 항목 파싱
    for _, item in ipairs(items) do
        item = item:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")  -- 앞뒤 공백 제거
        
        -- 빈 항목이 아닐 때만 처리
        if item ~= "" then
            local value = 1  -- 디폴트값
            local code = item
            
            -- 첫 글자가 숫자인지 확인
            local first_char = item:sub(1, 1)
            if first_char:match("%d") then
                -- 두 번째 글자가 있고 숫자인지 확인
                if #item >= 2 then
                    local second_char = item:sub(2, 2)
                    if second_char:match("%d") then
                        -- 두 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 2))
                        code = item:sub(3)
                    else
                        -- 한 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                        code = item:sub(2)
                    end
                else
                    -- 숫자만 하나 (예: "5")
                    value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                    code = ""
                end
            end
            
            -- code가 빈 문자열이거나 value가 0이면 스킵
            if code ~= "" and value ~= 0 then
                table.insert(codes, code)
                table.insert(values, value)
            end
        end
    end
    
    return {
        nCondition = #codes,
        code = codes,
        value = values
    }
end

function getTokenImage(color)
    return tokenImgUrl[color]
end

function giveToken(player, value, id)
    local icolor = string.gsub(id, 'giveToken_', '')
    spawnTokenToColor(icolor)
end

sequenceRecord = ''
function sequenceCheck(memo)
    if string.find(memo, 'sequence=') then
        local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(memo, 'sequence')
        for i = 1, sequenceCondition.nCondition do
            if sequenceCondition.value[i] > 1 then
                local searchcode = tostring(sequenceCondition.value[i] - 1)..sequenceCondition.code[i]
                if string.find(sequenceRecord, searchcode) == nil then
                    return false
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return true
end
function addSequence(param)
    for i = 1, param.nCondition do
        local addstr = param.value[i] .. param.code[i]
        if string.find(sequenceRecord, addstr) == nil then
            sequenceRecord = sequenceRecord .. param.value[i] .. param.code[i] .. ';'
        end
    end
end

gssflag = 0
function cardCallbackFunction(param)
    -- param.cardGuid
    -- param.cardName
    -- param.etcMemo
    -- param.callbackCode
    -- param.tcolor
    -- param.peekable
    -- param.ownedBy
    -- param.object
    if param.callbackCode == 'getScanCode' and gssflag == 0 then
        local pcNameOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcNameOfColor')
        if pcNameOfColor ~= nil and pcNameOfColor[param.tcolor] ~= nil then
            if pcNameOfColor[param.tcolor] == 'shs' then
                local tcard = getObjectFromGUID('83ac53')
                tcard.call('externCaller', {'deliverCard', param.tcolor, nil})
                gssflag = 1
            end
        end
    end
end

function conditionCheck(pColor)
    if string.find(etcMemo, 'need=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'require=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') == nil then
        return 0
    end
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then
            return 1
        end
    end

    local needCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'need')
    local requireCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'require')
    local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
    local nSequence = sequenceCondition.nCondition
    local nNeed = needCondition.nCondition
    local nRequire = requireCondition.nCondition

    if nSequence > 0 then
        local sw_seq = cBag.call('sequenceCheck', etcMemo)
        if sw_seq == false then
            return 2
        end
    end

    if nNeed + nRequire == 0 then
        return 0
    end

    local mainZone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    if mainZone == nil then
        return 1
    end

    local objs = mainZone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].hasTag('ChesterCard') then
            local targetMemo = objs[i].call('getEtcMemo')
            local acquireCondition = decodeCondition(targetMemo, 'acquire')

            local inzone = objs[i].getZones()
            local having = 0
            local anotherHaving = 0
            local seeing = 0
            for k = 1, #inzone do
                if inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' or inzone[k].getName() == 'coverzone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getDescription(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                end
            end
            if having == 0 and anotherHaving == 0 and (objs[i].is_face_down == false or objs[i].call('isPeekable', pColor)) then
                seeing = 1
            end

            if having == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == requireCondition.code[n] then
                            requireCondition.value[n] = requireCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            elseif seeing == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            local xval = 0
            for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + requireCondition.value[n]
            end
            for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + needCondition.value[n]
            end
            if xval == 0 then
                return 0
            end
        end
    end
    return 1
end
]==]
    else
        script_part1 = [==[
function conditionCheck(pColor)
    return 0
end
]==]
    end

end

-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}

userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'

userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

cBag = nil
ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = 0
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    cBag = findChesterBag()
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        ownedBy = state.s_ownedBy
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    -- if isHidden == 1 then
    --     self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    -- end


    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local addSeqFlag = false
        if isPublic == true then
            for i = 1, 10 do 
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 1 then
                    addSeqFlag = true
                    break
                end
            end
        else
            if ownedBy ~= nil then
                addSeqFlag = true
            end
        end
        if addSeqFlag == true then
            local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
            cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
        end
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정(GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(GM)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("상태초기화(GM)", resetCard, true)
    self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_ownedBy = ownedBy,
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,

        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,

    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    if isPublic == true then
        isHidden = input
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then 
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
        else
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
        end
    else
        if ownedBy == nil and input == 1 then
            self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
            isHidden = input
        else
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            isHidden = 0
        end
    end
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false and peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end

    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    playDealingSound()
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
        cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then
            broadcastToAll('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.')
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            for i = 1, 10 do
                peekable[userColorList[i]] = 1
            end
            if self.is_face_down == true then
                local trot = self.getRotation()
                trot.z = 0
                self.setRotation(trot)
            end
            return
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        if peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true and tcolor ~= 'Black' then
            broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드입니다.', tcolor)
        end
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if self.is_face_down == true then
            local trot = self.getRotation()
            trot.z = 0
            self.setRotation(trot)
        end
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    object = self,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        object = self,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                            object = self,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end

                local retcc = conditionCheck(tcolor)
                if retcc == 1 then
                    messageWait('이 카드의 획득 조건이 달성되지 않았습니다.')
                    return
                elseif retcc == 2 then
                    messageWait('이 카드 세트는 순서대로 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function isPeekable(player_color)
    if peekable[player_color] > 0 then 
        return true
    else
        return false
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end

    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID(']==] .. self.guid .. [==[')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_TOKEN_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    return cbag
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK ~= 2 then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = 2
    else
        permitOK = 0
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function resetCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK ~= 3 then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득/조사 상태를 초기화합니다.\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = 3
    else
        permitOK = 0
        broadcastToColor('이 카드가 초기화되었습니다.', 'Black')
        resetCardFunc()
    end
end

function resetCardFunc()
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    
    ownedBy = nil
    for i = 1, 10 do
        peekable[userColorList[i]] = 0
    end
    if self.is_face_down == false then
        local trot = self.getRotation()
        trot.z = 180
        self.setRotation(trot)
    end

    if cBag.getVar('value_initial_hidden') == 1 or isPublic == true then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
        isHidden = 1
    else
        isHidden = 0
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    end
    if cBag.getVar('value_initial_nohand') == 1 then
        self.use_hands = false
    else
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

<Button id="merge_object" offsetXY="100 -100" width="1000" height="160" fontSize="80" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" onClick="btclick">카드 합쳐지기 방지</Button>
<Text offsetXY="120 -300" fontSize="50" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" width="1800" height="1800" alignment="UpperLeft">활성화하면, 등록된 카드가 겹칠 때, 카드가 합쳐져 덱을 형성하는 것을 방지합니다.
등록된 카드 위에 다른 카드가 놓였을 때 덱을 형성하지 않습니다. 단, 등록된 카드를 등록되지 않은 카드 위에 놓았을 때는 덱이 형성됩니다.</Text>

<Button id="make_hidden" offsetXY="100 -650" width="1000" height="160" fontSize="80" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" onClick="btclick">카드 내용 감추기</Button>
<Text offsetXY="120 -850" fontSize="50" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" width="1800" height="1800" alignment="UpperLeft">활성화하면, 등록된 카드는 게임 시작시 GM을 제외한 플레이어에게 앞면 내용이 보이지 않게 됩니다. 토큰을 사용해야만 앞면의 내용을 볼 수 있게 됩니다.
</Text>

<Button id="make_nohand" offsetXY="100 -1100" width="1000" height="160" fontSize="80" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" onClick="btclick">핸드로 가져가기 방지</Button>
<Text offsetXY="120 -1300" fontSize="50" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" width="1800" height="1800" alignment="UpperLeft">활성화하면, 등록된 카드는 핸드에 들고 있지 못하게 됩니다. '1'키를 사용해도 핸드로 들어가지 않습니다. 토큰이 사용된 후에는 핸드로 들어갑니다.
</Text>

<Button id="make_allowgiving" offsetXY="100 -1550" width="1000" height="160" fontSize="80" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" onClick="btclick">토큰 양도 불가</Button>
<Text offsetXY="120 -1750" fontSize="50" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" width="1800" height="1800" alignment="UpperLeft">양도 가능 설정시, 토큰을 다른 플레이어에게 주면 그 플레이어가 사용할 수 있습니다. 양도 불가 설정시, 다른 플레이어의 토큰을 사용할 수 없습니다.
</Text>

<Button id="make_locationmipple" offsetXY="100 -2000" width="1000" height="160" fontSize="80" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" onClick="btclick" color="#FFFF44">토큰 스폰 지점 설정</Button>
<Text offsetXY="120 -2200" fontSize="50" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" width="1800" height="1800" alignment="UpperLeft">버튼을 누르면 플레이어 색상별로 미플이 생성됩니다. 조사 토큰을 나누어줄 장소에 미플을 갖다 놓습니다. (플레이어가 존재하지 않는 색상의 미플은 Delete로 삭제합니다.) 다시 위의 설정 버튼을 누르면 조사 토큰 스폰 지점이 설정되고, 주머니-우클릭 후 조사 토큰 배포 메뉴를 눌러 토큰을 1개씩 배포할 수 있습니다.
</Text>

<Button id="make_restrictMore" offsetXY="100 -2550" width="1000" height="160" fontSize="80" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" onClick="btclick">카드 중복 획득 방지</Button>
<Text offsetXY="120 -2750" fontSize="50" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" width="1800" height="1800" alignment="UpperLeft">방지를 활성화하면 같은 이름(Name)의 카드는 한 페이즈에 두 번 이상 가져갈 수 없습니다.
페이즈가 지난 후, 토큰 주머니를 우클릭하여 [페이즈 초기화]를 하면 중복된 이름의 카드를 다시 가져갈 수 있게 됩니다.
</Text>

<Button id="make_colorRestriction" offsetXY="100 -3100" width="1000" height="160" fontSize="80" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" onClick="btclick">본인 정보 카드 획득 방지</Button>
<Text offsetXY="120 -3300" fontSize="50" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" width="1800" height="1800" alignment="UpperLeft">방지를 활성화하면 본인 정보 카드는 획득할 수 없게 됩니다.
</Text>

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Board
ObjectStates.Nickname:
예비공간

카드를 앞면으로 뒤집어도 다른 사람에게
내용이 보이지 않습니다.
※핸드 공간이 부족할 때 사용하세요.

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    local mainzone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    local colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink'}
    local objs = mainzone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '캐릭터 선택' then
            if objs[i].getDescription() == '' then
                for j = 1, #colorList do
                    self.UI.setAttribute('colorChoice'..colorList[j], 'active', 'true')
                end
                break
            elseif contains(colorList, objs[i].getDescription()) then
                self.UI.setAttribute('colorChoice'..objs[i].getDescription(), 'active', 'true')
            end
        end 
    end
end

function colorChoiceButton(player, value, id)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == self.getName() then
            objs[i].UI.setAttribute(id, 'active', 'false')
        end
    end
    local color = string.gsub(id, 'colorChoice', '')
    Global.call('externChooseColor', {t_player = player, t_color = color, t_position = self.getPosition(), t_pcName = self.getDescription()})
    self.destroyObject()
end

function contains(table, value)
    for i, v in ipairs(table) do
        if v == value then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

ObjectStates.Name: Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function updateSave()
    local data_to_save = {["ml"]=memoryList}
    saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
    self.script_state = saved_data
end

function onload(saved_data)
    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        --Set up information off of loaded_data
        memoryList = loaded_data.ml
    else
        --Set up information for if there is no saved saved data
        memoryList = {}
    end

    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end

    self.setColorTint('Green')
end


--Beginning Setup


--Make setup button
function createSetupButton()
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Triggered by setup button,
function buttonClick_setup()
    memoryListBackup = duplicateTable(memoryList)
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    createSetupActionButtons()
end

--Creates selection buttons on objects
function createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    local howManyButtons = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj ~= self then
            local dummyIndex = howManyButtons
            --On a normal bag, the button positions aren't the same size as the bag.
            globalScaleFactor = 1.25 * 1/self.getScale().x
            --Super sweet math to set button positions
            local selfPos = self.getPosition()
            local objPos = obj.getPosition()
            local deltaPos = findOffsetDistance(selfPos, objPos, obj)
            local objPos = rotateLocalCoordinates(deltaPos, self)
            objPos.x = -objPos.x * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.y = objPos.y * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.z = objPos.z * globalScaleFactor
            --Offset rotation of bag
            local rot = self.getRotation()
            rot.y = -rot.y + 180
            --Create function
            local funcName = "selectButton_" .. howManyButtons
            local func = function() buttonClick_selection(dummyIndex, obj) end
            self.setVar(funcName, func)
            self.createButton({
                click_function=funcName, function_owner=self,
                position=objPos, rotation=rot, height=1000, width=1000,
                color={0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6},
            })
            howManyButtons = howManyButtons + 1
        end
    end
end

--Creates submit and cancel buttons
function createSetupActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Cancel", click_function="buttonClick_cancel", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Submit", click_function="buttonClick_submit", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Reset", click_function="buttonClick_reset", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end


--During Setup


--Checks or unchecks buttons
function buttonClick_selection(index, obj)
    local color = {0,1,0,0.6}
    if memoryList[obj.getGUID()] == nil then
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        --Adding pos/rot to memory table
        local pos, rot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
        --I need to add it like this or it won't save due to indexing issue
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = {
            pos={x=round(pos.x,4), y=round(pos.y,4), z=round(pos.z,4)},
            rot={x=round(rot.x,4), y=round(rot.y,4), z=round(rot.z,4)},
            lock=obj.getLock()
        }
        obj.highlightOn({0,1,0})
    else
        color = {0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6}
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = nil
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Cancels selection process
function buttonClick_cancel()
    memoryList = memoryListBackup
    self.clearButtons()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Selection Canceled", {1,1,1})
end

--Saves selections
function buttonClick_submit()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        broadcastToAll("You cannot submit without any selections.", {0.75, 0.25, 0.25})
    else
        self.clearButtons()
        createMemoryActionButtons()
        local count = 0
        for guid in pairs(memoryList) do
            count = count + 1
            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if obj ~= nil then obj.highlightOff() end
        end
        broadcastToAll(count.." Objects Saved", {1,1,1})
        updateSave()
    end
end

--Resets bag to starting status
function buttonClick_reset()
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createSetupButton()
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Tool Reset", {1,1,1})
    updateSave()
end


--After Setup


--Creates recall and place buttons
function createMemoryActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Place", click_function="buttonClick_place", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Recall", click_function="buttonClick_recall", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Sends objects from bag/table to their saved position/rotation
function buttonClick_place()
    local bagObjList = self.getObjects()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        --If obj is out on the table, move it to the saved pos/rot
        if obj ~= nil then
            obj.setPositionSmooth(entry.pos)
            obj.setRotationSmooth(entry.rot)
            obj.setLock(entry.lock)
        else
            --If obj is inside of the bag
            for _, bagObj in ipairs(bagObjList) do
                if bagObj.guid == guid then
                    local item = self.takeObject({
                        guid=guid, position=entry.pos, rotation=entry.rot,
                    })
                    item.setLock(entry.lock)
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
    broadcastToAll("Objects Placed", {1,1,1})
    self.setColorTint('Red')
    Global.call('externForbidOnesOwnCard')
end

--Recalls objects to bag from table
function buttonClick_recall()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        if obj ~= nil then self.putObject(obj) end
    end
    broadcastToAll("Objects Recalled", {1,1,1})
    self.setColorTint('Green')
end


--Utility functions


--Find delta (difference) between 2 x/y/z coordinates
function findOffsetDistance(p1, p2, obj)
    local deltaPos = {}
    local bounds = obj.getBounds()
    deltaPos.x = (p2.x-p1.x)
    deltaPos.y = (p2.y-p1.y) + (bounds.size.y - bounds.offset.y)
    deltaPos.z = (p2.z-p1.z)
    return deltaPos
end

--Used to rotate a set of coordinates by an angle
function rotateLocalCoordinates(desiredPos, obj)
	local objPos, objRot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
    local angle = math.rad(objRot.y)
	local x = desiredPos.x * math.cos(angle) - desiredPos.z * math.sin(angle)
	local z = desiredPos.x * math.sin(angle) + desiredPos.z * math.cos(angle)
	--return {x=objPos.x+x, y=objPos.y+desiredPos.y, z=objPos.z+z}
    return {x=x, y=desiredPos.y, z=z}
end

--Coroutine delay, in seconds
function wait(time)
    local start = os.time()
    repeat coroutine.yield(0) until os.time() > start + time
end

--Duplicates a table (needed to prevent it making reference to the same objects)
function duplicateTable(oldTable)
    local newTable = {}
    for k, v in pairs(oldTable) do
        newTable[k] = v
    end
    return newTable
end

--Moves scripted highlight from all objects
function removeAllHighlights()
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Round number (num) to the Nth decimal (dec)
function round(num, dec)
  local mult = 10^(dec or 0)
  return math.floor(num * mult + 0.5) / mult
end

ObjectStates.Name: ScriptingTrigger
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function setHiddenByZone(object)
    local objZones = object.getZones()
    local hideFrom = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    local zoneDesc
    local zoneCount = 0
    if string.find(object.getDescription(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getName(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'nohide') then
        return
    end
    for i = 1, #objZones do
        zoneDesc = objZones[i].getDescription()
        if objZones[i].getName() == 'coverzone' then
            zoneCount = zoneCount + 1
            for j = 1, #hideFrom do
                if string.find(zoneDesc, hideFrom[j]) then
                    hideFrom[j] = 'Grey'
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if zoneCount == 0 then
        object.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        object.setHiddenFrom(hideFrom)
    end
end
function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onLoad()
    local tmpobjs = self.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #tmpobjs do
        setHiddenByZone(tmpobjs[i])
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function updateSave()
    local data_to_save = {["ml"]=memoryList}
    saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
    self.script_state = saved_data
end

function onload(saved_data)
    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        --Set up information off of loaded_data
        memoryList = loaded_data.ml
    else
        --Set up information for if there is no saved saved data
        memoryList = {}
    end

    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end

    self.setColorTint('Green')
end


--Beginning Setup


--Make setup button
function createSetupButton()
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Triggered by setup button,
function buttonClick_setup()
    memoryListBackup = duplicateTable(memoryList)
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    createSetupActionButtons()
end

--Creates selection buttons on objects
function createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    local howManyButtons = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj ~= self then
            local dummyIndex = howManyButtons
            --On a normal bag, the button positions aren't the same size as the bag.
            globalScaleFactor = 1.25 * 1/self.getScale().x
            --Super sweet math to set button positions
            local selfPos = self.getPosition()
            local objPos = obj.getPosition()
            local deltaPos = findOffsetDistance(selfPos, objPos, obj)
            local objPos = rotateLocalCoordinates(deltaPos, self)
            objPos.x = -objPos.x * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.y = objPos.y * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.z = objPos.z * globalScaleFactor
            --Offset rotation of bag
            local rot = self.getRotation()
            rot.y = -rot.y + 180
            --Create function
            local funcName = "selectButton_" .. howManyButtons
            local func = function() buttonClick_selection(dummyIndex, obj) end
            self.setVar(funcName, func)
            self.createButton({
                click_function=funcName, function_owner=self,
                position=objPos, rotation=rot, height=1000, width=1000,
                color={0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6},
            })
            howManyButtons = howManyButtons + 1
        end
    end
end

--Creates submit and cancel buttons
function createSetupActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Cancel", click_function="buttonClick_cancel", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Submit", click_function="buttonClick_submit", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Reset", click_function="buttonClick_reset", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end


--During Setup


--Checks or unchecks buttons
function buttonClick_selection(index, obj)
    local color = {0,1,0,0.6}
    if memoryList[obj.getGUID()] == nil then
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        --Adding pos/rot to memory table
        local pos, rot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
        --I need to add it like this or it won't save due to indexing issue
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = {
            pos={x=round(pos.x,4), y=round(pos.y,4), z=round(pos.z,4)},
            rot={x=round(rot.x,4), y=round(rot.y,4), z=round(rot.z,4)},
            lock=obj.getLock()
        }
        obj.highlightOn({0,1,0})
    else
        color = {0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6}
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = nil
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Cancels selection process
function buttonClick_cancel()
    memoryList = memoryListBackup
    self.clearButtons()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Selection Canceled", {1,1,1})
end

--Saves selections
function buttonClick_submit()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        broadcastToAll("You cannot submit without any selections.", {0.75, 0.25, 0.25})
    else
        self.clearButtons()
        createMemoryActionButtons()
        local count = 0
        for guid in pairs(memoryList) do
            count = count + 1
            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if obj ~= nil then obj.highlightOff() end
        end
        broadcastToAll(count.." Objects Saved", {1,1,1})
        updateSave()
    end
end

--Resets bag to starting status
function buttonClick_reset()
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createSetupButton()
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Tool Reset", {1,1,1})
    updateSave()
end


--After Setup


--Creates recall and place buttons
function createMemoryActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Place", click_function="buttonClick_place", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Recall", click_function="buttonClick_recall", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Sends objects from bag/table to their saved position/rotation
function buttonClick_place()
    local bagObjList = self.getObjects()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        --If obj is out on the table, move it to the saved pos/rot
        if obj ~= nil then
            obj.setPositionSmooth(entry.pos)
            obj.setRotationSmooth(entry.rot)
            obj.setLock(entry.lock)
        else
            --If obj is inside of the bag
            for _, bagObj in ipairs(bagObjList) do
                if bagObj.guid == guid then
                    local item = self.takeObject({
                        guid=guid, position=entry.pos, rotation=entry.rot,
                    })
                    item.setLock(entry.lock)
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
    broadcastToAll("Objects Placed", {1,1,1})
    self.setColorTint('Red')
    Global.call('externForbidOnesOwnCard')
end

--Recalls objects to bag from table
function buttonClick_recall()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        if obj ~= nil then self.putObject(obj) end
    end
    broadcastToAll("Objects Recalled", {1,1,1})
    self.setColorTint('Green')
end


--Utility functions


--Find delta (difference) between 2 x/y/z coordinates
function findOffsetDistance(p1, p2, obj)
    local deltaPos = {}
    local bounds = obj.getBounds()
    deltaPos.x = (p2.x-p1.x)
    deltaPos.y = (p2.y-p1.y) + (bounds.size.y - bounds.offset.y)
    deltaPos.z = (p2.z-p1.z)
    return deltaPos
end

--Used to rotate a set of coordinates by an angle
function rotateLocalCoordinates(desiredPos, obj)
	local objPos, objRot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
    local angle = math.rad(objRot.y)
	local x = desiredPos.x * math.cos(angle) - desiredPos.z * math.sin(angle)
	local z = desiredPos.x * math.sin(angle) + desiredPos.z * math.cos(angle)
	--return {x=objPos.x+x, y=objPos.y+desiredPos.y, z=objPos.z+z}
    return {x=x, y=desiredPos.y, z=z}
end

--Coroutine delay, in seconds
function wait(time)
    local start = os.time()
    repeat coroutine.yield(0) until os.time() > start + time
end

--Duplicates a table (needed to prevent it making reference to the same objects)
function duplicateTable(oldTable)
    local newTable = {}
    for k, v in pairs(oldTable) do
        newTable[k] = v
    end
    return newTable
end

--Moves scripted highlight from all objects
function removeAllHighlights()
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Round number (num) to the Nth decimal (dec)
function round(num, dec)
  local mult = 10^(dec or 0)
  return math.floor(num * mult + 0.5) / mult
end

ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
blackboard = {}
whiteboard = {}
figurine = {}

function onLoad()
    local btcolor = self.getDescription()
    local tooltiptext
    tooltiptext = self.getName()
    self.tooltip = true
    if btcolor ~= 'White' and btcolor ~= 'Brown' and btcolor ~= 'Red' and btcolor ~= 'Orange' and btcolor ~= 'Yellow'
        and btcolor ~= 'Green' and btcolor ~= 'Blue' and btcolor ~= 'Purple' and btcolor ~= 'Pink' and btcolor ~= 'Teal' then
        self.setColorTint({1, 1, 1})
        btcolor = {0.2, 0.2, 0.2}
        self.createButton({position={x=0, y=1, z=0}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color=btcolor, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=tooltiptext})
    else
        self.createButton({position={x=0, y=1, z=0}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color=btcolor, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=tooltiptext})
        self.setColorTint(btcolor)
    end
    
    blackboard[1] = getObjectFromGUID('339948')
    blackboard[2] = getObjectFromGUID('c3b214')
    blackboard[3] = getObjectFromGUID('2c3052')
    blackboard[4] = getObjectFromGUID('4418d1')
    blackboard[5] = getObjectFromGUID('415cee')
    blackboard[6] = getObjectFromGUID('0a5a65')
    blackboard[7] = getObjectFromGUID('5cf033')
    blackboard[8] = getObjectFromGUID('162a45')
    whiteboard[1] = getObjectFromGUID('365f80')
    whiteboard[2] = getObjectFromGUID('847719')
    whiteboard[3] = getObjectFromGUID('e7cb6b')
    whiteboard[4] = getObjectFromGUID('a41bdb')
    whiteboard[5] = getObjectFromGUID('01458b')
    whiteboard[6] = getObjectFromGUID('a3daa2')
    whiteboard[7] = getObjectFromGUID('880245')
    whiteboard[8] = getObjectFromGUID('f19b01')
    figurine[1] = getObjectFromGUID('2fb724')
    figurine[2] = getObjectFromGUID('ab6d67')
    figurine[3] = getObjectFromGUID('17391f')
    figurine[4] = getObjectFromGUID('fd71ca')
    figurine[5] = getObjectFromGUID('cf8048')
    figurine[6] = getObjectFromGUID('55af25')
    figurine[7] = getObjectFromGUID('b5cdbd')
    figurine[8] = getObjectFromGUID('8d75cd')
end


function userFunction(obj, color, alt_click)
    if color == 'Black' or color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    local pcNameOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcNameOfColor')
    if pcNameOfColor[color] ~= nil then
        return
    end
    local InfoTile = {}
    local InfoTilePicked = nil
    local objGUIDList = {'51c20f', '61ee49', 'a75996', 'fd748a', 'abb446', 'b08354', '971576', 'e83305'}
    local pcName = ''
    for i = 1, #objGUIDList do
        if getObjectFromGUID(objGUIDList[i]) ~= nil then
            InfoTile[#InfoTile + 1] = getObjectFromGUID(objGUIDList[i])
        end
    end
    
    for i = 1, #InfoTile do
        local tx = InfoTile[i].getPosition().x
        local tz = InfoTile[i].getPosition().z
        if (math.abs(self.getPosition().x - tx)) < 1.0 and tz > -25 then
            local portobj = findObject('Portrait', InfoTile[i].getGMNotes(), nil)
            if portobj ~= nil then
                local cobj = portobj.getCustomObject()
                Global.call('externChangeFigurineImg', {t_color = color, t_imgUrl = cobj.image_secondary})
            end
            pcName = InfoTile[i].getGMNotes()
            InfoTilePicked = InfoTile[i]
            self.destroyObject()
            break
        end
    end
    
    Global.call('externPlayerRegister', {t_name = pcName, t_color = color, t_infoTile = InfoTilePicked})

    if findObject('캐릭터 선택', nil, nil) == nil then
        Wait.time(function ()
            for i = 1, 8 do
                local cp = findObject('ColorSelectionPanel', 'pc'..tostring(i), 'nohide')
                if cp ~= nil then
                    blackboard[i].destroyObject()
                    whiteboard[i].destroyObject()
                    if figurine[i] ~= nil then
                        figurine[i].destroyObject()
                    end
                    cp.destroyObject()
                end
            end
        end, 1)
    end
end

function externUserFunction(params)
    return userFunction(params.t_obj, params.t_color, params.t_alt_click)
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end

        local tx = InfoTile[i].getPosition().x
        local tz = InfoTile[i].getPosition().z
        if (math.abs(self.getPosition().x - tx)) < 1.0 and tz > -25 then
            local portobj = findObject('Portrait', InfoTile[i].getGMNotes(), nil)
            if portobj ~= nil then
                local cobj = portobj.getCustomObject()
                Global.call('externChangeFigurineImg', {t_color = color, t_imgUrl = cobj.image_secondary})
            end
            pcName = InfoTile[i].getGMNotes()
            InfoTilePicked = InfoTile[i]
            self.destroyObject()
            break
        end
    end
    
    Global.call('externPlayerRegister', {t_name = pcName, t_color = color, t_infoTile = InfoTilePicked})

    if findObject('캐릭터 선택', nil, nil) == nil then
        Wait.time(function ()
            for i = 1, 8 do
                local cp = findObject('ColorSelectionPanel', 'pc'..tostring(i), 'nohide')
                if cp ~= nil then
                    blackboard[i].destroyObject()
                    whiteboard[i].destroyObject()
                    if figurine[i] ~= nil then
                        figurine[i].destroyObject()
                    end
                    cp.destroyObject()
                end
            end
        end, 1)
    end
end

function externUserFunction(params)
    return userFunction(params.t_obj, params.t_color, params.t_alt_click)
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end

function onLoad()
    local mainzone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    local colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink'}
    local objs = mainzone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '캐릭터 선택' then
            if objs[i].getDescription() == '' then
                for j = 1, #colorList do
                    self.UI.setAttribute('colorChoice'..colorList[j], 'active', 'true')
                end
                break
            elseif contains(colorList, objs[i].getDescription()) then
                self.UI.setAttribute('colorChoice'..objs[i].getDescription(), 'active', 'true')
            end
        end 
    end
end

function colorChoiceButton(player, value, id)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == self.getName() then
            objs[i].UI.setAttribute(id, 'active', 'false')
        end
    end
    local color = string.gsub(id, 'colorChoice', '')
    Global.call('externChooseColor', {t_player = player, t_color = color, t_position = self.getPosition(), t_pcName = self.getDescription()})
    self.destroyObject()
end

function contains(table, value)
    for i, v in ipairs(table) do
        if v == value then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end
