ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

cBag = nil
ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = 0
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    cBag = findChesterBag()
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        ownedBy = state.s_ownedBy
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    -- if isHidden == 1 then
    --     self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    -- end


    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local addSeqFlag = false
        if isPublic == true then
            for i = 1, 10 do 
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 1 then
                    addSeqFlag = true
                    break
                end
            end
        else
            if ownedBy ~= nil then
                addSeqFlag = true
            end
        end
        if addSeqFlag == true then
            local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
            cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
        end
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정(GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(GM)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("상태초기화(GM)", resetCard, true)
    Wait.frames(function()
        self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
    end, 150)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_ownedBy = ownedBy,
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    if isPublic == true then
        isHidden = input
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then 
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
        else
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
        end
    else
        if ownedBy == nil and input == 1 then
            self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
            isHidden = input
        else
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            isHidden = 0
        end
    end
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false and peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end

    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    playDealingSound()
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
        cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then
            broadcastToAll('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.')
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            for i = 1, 10 do
                peekable[userColorList[i]] = 1
            end
            if self.is_face_down == true then
                local trot = self.getRotation()
                trot.z = 0
                self.setRotation(trot)
            end
            return
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        if peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true and tcolor ~= 'Black' then
            broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드입니다.', tcolor)
        end
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if self.is_face_down == true then
            local trot = self.getRotation()
            trot.z = 0
            self.setRotation(trot)
        end
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    object = self,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        object = self,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                            object = self,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end

                local retcc = conditionCheck(tcolor)
                if retcc == 1 then
                    messageWait('이 카드의 획득 조건이 달성되지 않았습니다.')
                    return
                elseif retcc == 2 then
                    messageWait('이 카드 세트는 순서대로 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function isPeekable(player_color)
    if peekable[player_color] > 0 then 
        return true
    else
        return false
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end

    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

reloadSwitch = 0
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
        if zone.getName() == 'HandZone' then
            reloadSwitch = 1
        end
    end
end
function onDrop(color)
    if reloadSwitch ~= 0 then
        reloadSwitch = 0
        Wait.frames(function()
            print(self.guid)
            self.reload()
        end, 50)
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpZones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #tmpZones do
        if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
            if retPColor ~= nil then return end
            retPColor = tmpZones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_TOKEN_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    return cbag
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK ~= 2 then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = 2
    else
        permitOK = 0
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function resetCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK ~= 3 then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득/조사 상태를 초기화합니다.\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = 3
    else
        permitOK = 0
        broadcastToColor('이 카드가 초기화되었습니다.', 'Black')
        resetCardFunc()
    end
end

function resetCardFunc()
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    
    ownedBy = nil
    for i = 1, 10 do
        peekable[userColorList[i]] = 0
    end
    if self.is_face_down == false then
        local trot = self.getRotation()
        trot.z = 180
        self.setRotation(trot)
    end

    if cBag.getVar('value_initial_hidden') == 1 or isPublic == true then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
        isHidden = 1
    else
        isHidden = 0
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    end
    if cBag.getVar('value_initial_nohand') == 1 then
        self.use_hands = false
    else
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

function decodeCondition(str, condition)
    -- condition= 와 ; 사이의 문자열 추출
    local pattern = condition .. "=([^;]+)"
    local matched = str:match(pattern)
    
    if not matched then
        return {nCondition = 0, code = {}, value = {}}
    end
    
    -- 쉼표로 분리
    local items = {}
    for item in matched:gmatch("[^,]+") do
        table.insert(items, item)
    end
    
    local codes = {}
    local values = {}
    
    -- 각 항목 파싱
    for _, item in ipairs(items) do
        item = item:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")  -- 앞뒤 공백 제거
        
        -- 빈 항목이 아닐 때만 처리
        if item ~= "" then
            local value = 1  -- 디폴트값
            local code = item
            
            -- 첫 글자가 숫자인지 확인
            local first_char = item:sub(1, 1)
            if first_char:match("%d") then
                -- 두 번째 글자가 있고 숫자인지 확인
                if #item >= 2 then
                    local second_char = item:sub(2, 2)
                    if second_char:match("%d") then
                        -- 두 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 2))
                        code = item:sub(3)
                    else
                        -- 한 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                        code = item:sub(2)
                    end
                else
                    -- 숫자만 하나 (예: "5")
                    value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                    code = ""
                end
            end
            
            -- code가 빈 문자열이거나 value가 0이면 스킵
            if code ~= "" and value ~= 0 then
                table.insert(codes, code)
                table.insert(values, value)
            end
        end
    end
    
    return {
        nCondition = #codes,
        code = codes,
        value = values
    }
end

function conditionCheck(pColor)
    if string.find(etcMemo, 'need=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'require=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') == nil then
        return 0
    end
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then
            return 1
        end
    end

    local needCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'need')
    local requireCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'require')
    local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
    local nSequence = sequenceCondition.nCondition
    local nNeed = needCondition.nCondition
    local nRequire = requireCondition.nCondition

    if nSequence > 0 then
        local sw_seq = cBag.call('sequenceCheck', etcMemo)
        if sw_seq == false then
            return 2
        end
    end

    if nNeed + nRequire == 0 then
        return 0
    end

    local mainZone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    if mainZone == nil then
        return 1
    end

    local objs = mainZone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].hasTag('ChesterCard') then
            local targetMemo = objs[i].call('getEtcMemo')
            local acquireCondition = decodeCondition(targetMemo, 'acquire')

            local inzone = objs[i].getZones()
            local having = 0
            local anotherHaving = 0
            local seeing = 0
            for k = 1, #inzone do
                if inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' or inzone[k].getName() == 'coverzone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getDescription(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                end
            end
            if having == 0 and anotherHaving == 0 and (objs[i].is_face_down == false or objs[i].call('isPeekable', pColor)) then
                seeing = 1
            end

            if having == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == requireCondition.code[n] then
                            requireCondition.value[n] = requireCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            elseif seeing == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            local xval = 0
            for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + requireCondition.value[n]
            end
            for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + needCondition.value[n]
            end
            if xval == 0 then
                return 0
            end
        end
    end
    return 1
end
function playDealingSound()
    local soundbox = getObjectFromGUID('8270c2')
    soundbox.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(2)
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

cBag = nil
ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = 0
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    cBag = findChesterBag()
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        ownedBy = state.s_ownedBy
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    -- if isHidden == 1 then
    --     self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    -- end


    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local addSeqFlag = false
        if isPublic == true then
            for i = 1, 10 do 
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 1 then
                    addSeqFlag = true
                    break
                end
            end
        else
            if ownedBy ~= nil then
                addSeqFlag = true
            end
        end
        if addSeqFlag == true then
            local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
            cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
        end
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정(GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(GM)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("상태초기화(GM)", resetCard, true)
    Wait.frames(function()
        self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
    end, 150)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_ownedBy = ownedBy,
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    if isPublic == true then
        isHidden = input
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then 
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
        else
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
        end
    else
        if ownedBy == nil and input == 1 then
            self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
            isHidden = input
        else
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            isHidden = 0
        end
    end
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false and peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end

    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    playDealingSound()
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
        cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then
            broadcastToAll('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.')
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            for i = 1, 10 do
                peekable[userColorList[i]] = 1
            end
            if self.is_face_down == true then
                local trot = self.getRotation()
                trot.z = 0
                self.setRotation(trot)
            end
            return
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        if peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true and tcolor ~= 'Black' then
            broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드입니다.', tcolor)
        end
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if self.is_face_down == true then
            local trot = self.getRotation()
            trot.z = 0
            self.setRotation(trot)
        end
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    object = self,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        object = self,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                            object = self,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end

                local retcc = conditionCheck(tcolor)
                if retcc == 1 then
                    messageWait('이 카드의 획득 조건이 달성되지 않았습니다.')
                    return
                elseif retcc == 2 then
                    messageWait('이 카드 세트는 순서대로 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function isPeekable(player_color)
    if peekable[player_color] > 0 then 
        return true
    else
        return false
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end

    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

reloadSwitch = 0
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
        if zone.getName() == 'HandZone' then
            reloadSwitch = 1
        end
    end
end
function onDrop(color)
    if reloadSwitch ~= 0 then
        reloadSwitch = 0
        Wait.frames(function()
            print(self.guid)
            self.reload()
        end, 50)
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_TOKEN_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    return cbag
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK ~= 2 then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = 2
    else
        permitOK = 0
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function resetCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK ~= 3 then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득/조사 상태를 초기화합니다.\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = 3
    else
        permitOK = 0
        broadcastToColor('이 카드가 초기화되었습니다.', 'Black')
        resetCardFunc()
    end
end

function resetCardFunc()
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    
    ownedBy = nil
    for i = 1, 10 do
        peekable[userColorList[i]] = 0
    end
    if self.is_face_down == false then
        local trot = self.getRotation()
        trot.z = 180
        self.setRotation(trot)
    end

    if cBag.getVar('value_initial_hidden') == 1 or isPublic == true then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
        isHidden = 1
    else
        isHidden = 0
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    end
    if cBag.getVar('value_initial_nohand') == 1 then
        self.use_hands = false
    else
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

function decodeCondition(str, condition)
    -- condition= 와 ; 사이의 문자열 추출
    local pattern = condition .. "=([^;]+)"
    local matched = str:match(pattern)
    
    if not matched then
        return {nCondition = 0, code = {}, value = {}}
    end
    
    -- 쉼표로 분리
    local items = {}
    for item in matched:gmatch("[^,]+") do
        table.insert(items, item)
    end
    
    local codes = {}
    local values = {}
    
    -- 각 항목 파싱
    for _, item in ipairs(items) do
        item = item:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")  -- 앞뒤 공백 제거
        
        -- 빈 항목이 아닐 때만 처리
        if item ~= "" then
            local value = 1  -- 디폴트값
            local code = item
            
            -- 첫 글자가 숫자인지 확인
            local first_char = item:sub(1, 1)
            if first_char:match("%d") then
                -- 두 번째 글자가 있고 숫자인지 확인
                if #item >= 2 then
                    local second_char = item:sub(2, 2)
                    if second_char:match("%d") then
                        -- 두 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 2))
                        code = item:sub(3)
                    else
                        -- 한 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                        code = item:sub(2)
                    end
                else
                    -- 숫자만 하나 (예: "5")
                    value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                    code = ""
                end
            end
            
            -- code가 빈 문자열이거나 value가 0이면 스킵
            if code ~= "" and value ~= 0 then
                table.insert(codes, code)
                table.insert(values, value)
            end
        end
    end
    
    return {
        nCondition = #codes,
        code = codes,
        value = values
    }
end

function conditionCheck(pColor)
    if string.find(etcMemo, 'need=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'require=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') == nil then
        return 0
    end
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then
            return 1
        end
    end

    local needCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'need')
    local requireCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'require')
    local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
    local nSequence = sequenceCondition.nCondition
    local nNeed = needCondition.nCondition
    local nRequire = requireCondition.nCondition

    if nSequence > 0 then
        local sw_seq = cBag.call('sequenceCheck', etcMemo)
        if sw_seq == false then
            return 2
        end
    end

    if nNeed + nRequire == 0 then
        return 0
    end

    local mainZone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    if mainZone == nil then
        return 1
    end

    local objs = mainZone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].hasTag('ChesterCard') then
            local targetMemo = objs[i].call('getEtcMemo')
            local acquireCondition = decodeCondition(targetMemo, 'acquire')

            local inzone = objs[i].getZones()
            local having = 0
            local anotherHaving = 0
            local seeing = 0
            for k = 1, #inzone do
                if inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' or inzone[k].getName() == 'coverzone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getDescription(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                end
            end
            if having == 0 and anotherHaving == 0 and (objs[i].is_face_down == false or objs[i].call('isPeekable', pColor)) then
                seeing = 1
            end

            if having == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == requireCondition.code[n] then
                            requireCondition.value[n] = requireCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            elseif seeing == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            local xval = 0
            for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + requireCondition.value[n]
            end
            for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + needCondition.value[n]
            end
            if xval == 0 then
                return 0
            end
        end
    end
    return 1
end
function playDealingSound()
    local soundbox = getObjectFromGUID('8270c2')
    soundbox.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(2)
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

cBag = nil
ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = 0
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    cBag = findChesterBag()
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        ownedBy = state.s_ownedBy
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    -- if isHidden == 1 then
    --     self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    -- end


    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local addSeqFlag = false
        if isPublic == true then
            for i = 1, 10 do 
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 1 then
                    addSeqFlag = true
                    break
                end
            end
        else
            if ownedBy ~= nil then
                addSeqFlag = true
            end
        end
        if addSeqFlag == true then
            local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
            cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
        end
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정(GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(GM)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("상태초기화(GM)", resetCard, true)
    Wait.frames(function()
        self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
    end, 150)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_ownedBy = ownedBy,
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    if isPublic == true then
        isHidden = input
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then 
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
        else
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
        end
    else
        if ownedBy == nil and input == 1 then
            self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
            isHidden = input
        else
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            isHidden = 0
        end
    end
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false and peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end

    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    playDealingSound()
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
        cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then
            broadcastToAll('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.')
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            for i = 1, 10 do
                peekable[userColorList[i]] = 1
            end
            if self.is_face_down == true then
                local trot = self.getRotation()
                trot.z = 0
                self.setRotation(trot)
            end
            return
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        if peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true and tcolor ~= 'Black' then
            broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드입니다.', tcolor)
        end
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if self.is_face_down == true then
            local trot = self.getRotation()
            trot.z = 0
            self.setRotation(trot)
        end
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    object = self,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        object = self,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                            object = self,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end

                local retcc = conditionCheck(tcolor)
                if retcc == 1 then
                    messageWait('이 카드의 획득 조건이 달성되지 않았습니다.')
                    return
                elseif retcc == 2 then
                    messageWait('이 카드 세트는 순서대로 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)

    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

        return true
    else

    end
end

reloadSwitch = 0

        end

    if reloadSwitch ~= 0 then
        reloadSwitch = 0
        Wait.frames(function()
            print(self.guid)
            self.reload()
        end, 50)

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpZones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #tmpZones do
        if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
            if retPColor ~= nil then return end
            retPColor = tmpZones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_TOKEN_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    return cbag
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function decodeCondition(str, condition)
    -- condition= 와 ; 사이의 문자열 추출
    local pattern = condition .. "=([^;]+)"
    local matched = str:match(pattern)
    
    if not matched then
        return {nCondition = 0, code = {}, value = {}}
    end
    
    -- 쉼표로 분리
    local items = {}
    for item in matched:gmatch("[^,]+") do
        table.insert(items, item)
    end
    
    local codes = {}
    local values = {}
    
    -- 각 항목 파싱
    for _, item in ipairs(items) do
        item = item:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")  -- 앞뒤 공백 제거
        
        -- 빈 항목이 아닐 때만 처리
        if item ~= "" then
            local value = 1  -- 디폴트값
            local code = item
            
            -- 첫 글자가 숫자인지 확인
            local first_char = item:sub(1, 1)
            if first_char:match("%d") then
                -- 두 번째 글자가 있고 숫자인지 확인
                if #item >= 2 then
                    local second_char = item:sub(2, 2)
                    if second_char:match("%d") then
                        -- 두 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 2))
                        code = item:sub(3)
                    else
                        -- 한 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                        code = item:sub(2)
                    end
                else
                    -- 숫자만 하나 (예: "5")
                    value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                    code = ""
                end
            end
            
            -- code가 빈 문자열이거나 value가 0이면 스킵
            if code ~= "" and value ~= 0 then
                table.insert(codes, code)
                table.insert(values, value)
            end
        end
    end
    
    return {
        nCondition = #codes,
        code = codes,
        value = values
    }
end

function conditionCheck(pColor)
    if string.find(etcMemo, 'need=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'require=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') == nil then
        return 0
    end
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then
            return 1
        end
    end

    local needCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'need')
    local requireCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'require')
    local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
    local nSequence = sequenceCondition.nCondition
    local nNeed = needCondition.nCondition
    local nRequire = requireCondition.nCondition

    if nSequence > 0 then
        local sw_seq = cBag.call('sequenceCheck', etcMemo)
        if sw_seq == false then
            return 2
        end
    end

    if nNeed + nRequire == 0 then
        return 0
    end

    local mainZone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    if mainZone == nil then
        return 1
    end

    local objs = mainZone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].hasTag('ChesterCard') then
            local targetMemo = objs[i].call('getEtcMemo')
            local acquireCondition = decodeCondition(targetMemo, 'acquire')

            local inzone = objs[i].getZones()
            local having = 0
            local anotherHaving = 0
            local seeing = 0
            for k = 1, #inzone do
                if inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' or inzone[k].getName() == 'coverzone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getDescription(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                end
            end
            if having == 0 and anotherHaving == 0 and (objs[i].is_face_down == false or objs[i].call('isPeekable', pColor)) then
                seeing = 1
            end

            if having == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == requireCondition.code[n] then
                            requireCondition.value[n] = requireCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            elseif seeing == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            local xval = 0
            for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + requireCondition.value[n]
            end
            for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + needCondition.value[n]
            end
            if xval == 0 then
                return 0
            end
        end
    end
    return 1
end
function playDealingSound()
    local soundbox = getObjectFromGUID('8270c2')
    soundbox.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(2)
end
