ObjectStates.Name: CardCustom
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

cBag = nil
ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = 0
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    cBag = findChesterBag()
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        ownedBy = state.s_ownedBy
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    -- if isHidden == 1 then
    --     self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    -- end


    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local addSeqFlag = false
        if isPublic == true then
            for i = 1, 10 do 
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 1 then
                    addSeqFlag = true
                    break
                end
            end
        else
            if ownedBy ~= nil then
                addSeqFlag = true
            end
        end
        if addSeqFlag == true then
            local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
            cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
        end
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정(GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(GM)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("상태초기화(GM)", resetCard, true)
    self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_ownedBy = ownedBy,
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    if isPublic == true then
        isHidden = input
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then 
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
        else
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
        end
    else
        if ownedBy == nil and input == 1 then
            self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
            isHidden = input
        else
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            isHidden = 0
        end
    end
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false and peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end

    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    playDealingSound()
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
        cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then
            broadcastToAll('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.')
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            for i = 1, 10 do
                peekable[userColorList[i]] = 1
            end
            if self.is_face_down == true then
                local trot = self.getRotation()
                trot.z = 0
                self.setRotation(trot)
            end
            return
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        if peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true and tcolor ~= 'Black' then
            broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드입니다.', tcolor)
        end
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if self.is_face_down == true then
            local trot = self.getRotation()
            trot.z = 0
            self.setRotation(trot)
        end
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    object = self,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        object = self,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                            object = self,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end

                local retcc = conditionCheck(tcolor)
                if retcc == 1 then
                    messageWait('이 카드의 획득 조건이 달성되지 않았습니다.')
                    return
                elseif retcc == 2 then
                    messageWait('이 카드 세트는 순서대로 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function isPeekable(player_color)
    if peekable[player_color] > 0 then 
        return true
    else
        return false
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end

    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_TOKEN_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    return cbag
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK ~= 2 then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = 2
    else
        permitOK = 0
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function resetCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK ~= 3 then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득/조사 상태를 초기화합니다.\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = 3
    else
        permitOK = 0
        broadcastToColor('이 카드가 초기화되었습니다.', 'Black')
        resetCardFunc()
    end
end

function resetCardFunc()
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    
    ownedBy = nil
    for i = 1, 10 do
        peekable[userColorList[i]] = 0
    end
    if self.is_face_down == false then
        local trot = self.getRotation()
        trot.z = 180
        self.setRotation(trot)
    end

    if cBag.getVar('value_initial_hidden') == 1 or isPublic == true then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
        isHidden = 1
    else
        isHidden = 0
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    end
    if cBag.getVar('value_initial_nohand') == 1 then
        self.use_hands = false
    else
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

function decodeCondition(str, condition)
    -- condition= 와 ; 사이의 문자열 추출
    local pattern = condition .. "=([^;]+)"
    local matched = str:match(pattern)
    
    if not matched then
        return {nCondition = 0, code = {}, value = {}}
    end
    
    -- 쉼표로 분리
    local items = {}
    for item in matched:gmatch("[^,]+") do
        table.insert(items, item)
    end
    
    local codes = {}
    local values = {}
    
    -- 각 항목 파싱
    for _, item in ipairs(items) do
        item = item:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")  -- 앞뒤 공백 제거
        
        -- 빈 항목이 아닐 때만 처리
        if item ~= "" then
            local value = 1  -- 디폴트값
            local code = item
            
            -- 첫 글자가 숫자인지 확인
            local first_char = item:sub(1, 1)
            if first_char:match("%d") then
                -- 두 번째 글자가 있고 숫자인지 확인
                if #item >= 2 then
                    local second_char = item:sub(2, 2)
                    if second_char:match("%d") then
                        -- 두 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 2))
                        code = item:sub(3)
                    else
                        -- 한 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                        code = item:sub(2)
                    end
                else
                    -- 숫자만 하나 (예: "5")
                    value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                    code = ""
                end
            end
            
            -- code가 빈 문자열이거나 value가 0이면 스킵
            if code ~= "" and value ~= 0 then
                table.insert(codes, code)
                table.insert(values, value)
            end
        end
    end
    
    return {
        nCondition = #codes,
        code = codes,
        value = values
    }
end

function conditionCheck(pColor)
    if string.find(etcMemo, 'need=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'require=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') == nil then
        return 0
    end
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then
            return 1
        end
    end

    local needCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'need')
    local requireCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'require')
    local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
    local nSequence = sequenceCondition.nCondition
    local nNeed = needCondition.nCondition
    local nRequire = requireCondition.nCondition

    if nSequence > 0 then
        local sw_seq = cBag.call('sequenceCheck', etcMemo)
        if sw_seq == false then
            return 2
        end
    end

    if nNeed + nRequire == 0 then
        return 0
    end

    local mainZone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    if mainZone == nil then
        return 1
    end

    local objs = mainZone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].hasTag('ChesterCard') then
            local targetMemo = objs[i].call('getEtcMemo')
            local acquireCondition = decodeCondition(targetMemo, 'acquire')

            local inzone = objs[i].getZones()
            local having = 0
            local anotherHaving = 0
            local seeing = 0
            for k = 1, #inzone do
                if inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' or inzone[k].getName() == 'coverzone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getDescription(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                end
            end
            if having == 0 and anotherHaving == 0 and (objs[i].is_face_down == false or objs[i].call('isPeekable', pColor)) then
                seeing = 1
            end

            if having == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == requireCondition.code[n] then
                            requireCondition.value[n] = requireCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            elseif seeing == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            local xval = 0
            for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + requireCondition.value[n]
            end
            for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + needCondition.value[n]
            end
            if xval == 0 then
                return 0
            end
        end
    end
    return 1
end
function playDealingSound()
    local soundbox = getObjectFromGUID('8270c2')
    soundbox.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(2)
end

ObjectStates.Name: CardCustom
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

cBag = nil
ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = 0
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    cBag = findChesterBag()
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        ownedBy = state.s_ownedBy
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    -- if isHidden == 1 then
    --     self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    -- end


    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local addSeqFlag = false
        if isPublic == true then
            for i = 1, 10 do 
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 1 then
                    addSeqFlag = true
                    break
                end
            end
        else
            if ownedBy ~= nil then
                addSeqFlag = true
            end
        end
        if addSeqFlag == true then
            local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
            cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
        end
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정(GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(GM)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("상태초기화(GM)", resetCard, true)
    self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_ownedBy = ownedBy,
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    if isPublic == true then
        isHidden = input
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then 
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
        else
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
        end
    else
        if ownedBy == nil and input == 1 then
            self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
            isHidden = input
        else
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            isHidden = 0
        end
    end
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false and peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end

    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    playDealingSound()
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') then
        local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
        cBag.call('addSequence', sequenceCondition)
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then
            broadcastToAll('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.')
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            for i = 1, 10 do
                peekable[userColorList[i]] = 1
            end
            if self.is_face_down == true then
                local trot = self.getRotation()
                trot.z = 0
                self.setRotation(trot)
            end
            return
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        if peekable[tcolor] == 1 then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true and tcolor ~= 'Black' then
            broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드입니다.', tcolor)
        end
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if self.is_face_down == true then
            local trot = self.getRotation()
            trot.z = 0
            self.setRotation(trot)
        end
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    object = self,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        object = self,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                            object = self,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end

                local retcc = conditionCheck(tcolor)
                if retcc == 1 then
                    messageWait('이 카드의 획득 조건이 달성되지 않았습니다.')
                    return
                elseif retcc == 2 then
                    messageWait('이 카드 세트는 순서대로 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

        return true
    else
        return false
    end
end

        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end

    if cbag == nil then
        return false

    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_TOKEN_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    return cbag
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then return end
    end
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = 0
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function decodeCondition(str, condition)
    -- condition= 와 ; 사이의 문자열 추출
    local pattern = condition .. "=([^;]+)"
    local matched = str:match(pattern)
    
    if not matched then
        return {nCondition = 0, code = {}, value = {}}
    end
    
    -- 쉼표로 분리
    local items = {}
    for item in matched:gmatch("[^,]+") do
        table.insert(items, item)
    end
    
    local codes = {}
    local values = {}
    
    -- 각 항목 파싱
    for _, item in ipairs(items) do
        item = item:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")  -- 앞뒤 공백 제거
        
        -- 빈 항목이 아닐 때만 처리
        if item ~= "" then
            local value = 1  -- 디폴트값
            local code = item
            
            -- 첫 글자가 숫자인지 확인
            local first_char = item:sub(1, 1)
            if first_char:match("%d") then
                -- 두 번째 글자가 있고 숫자인지 확인
                if #item >= 2 then
                    local second_char = item:sub(2, 2)
                    if second_char:match("%d") then
                        -- 두 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 2))
                        code = item:sub(3)
                    else
                        -- 한 자릿수
                        value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                        code = item:sub(2)
                    end
                else
                    -- 숫자만 하나 (예: "5")
                    value = tonumber(item:sub(1, 1))
                    code = ""
                end
            end
            
            -- code가 빈 문자열이거나 value가 0이면 스킵
            if code ~= "" and value ~= 0 then
                table.insert(codes, code)
                table.insert(values, value)
            end
        end
    end
    
    return {
        nCondition = #codes,
        code = codes,
        value = values
    }
end

function conditionCheck(pColor)
    if string.find(etcMemo, 'need=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'require=') == nil and string.find(etcMemo, 'sequence=') == nil then
        return 0
    end
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
        if cBag == nil then
            return 1
        end
    end

    local needCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'need')
    local requireCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'require')
    local sequenceCondition = decodeCondition(etcMemo, 'sequence')
    local nSequence = sequenceCondition.nCondition
    local nNeed = needCondition.nCondition
    local nRequire = requireCondition.nCondition

    if nSequence > 0 then
        local sw_seq = cBag.call('sequenceCheck', etcMemo)
        if sw_seq == false then
            return 2
        end
    end

    if nNeed + nRequire == 0 then
        return 0
    end

    local mainZone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    if mainZone == nil then
        return 1
    end

    local objs = mainZone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].hasTag('ChesterCard') then
            local targetMemo = objs[i].call('getEtcMemo')
            local acquireCondition = decodeCondition(targetMemo, 'acquire')

            local inzone = objs[i].getZones()
            local having = 0
            local anotherHaving = 0
            local seeing = 0
            for k = 1, #inzone do
                if inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'FrontZone' or inzone[k].getName() == 'coverzone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getGMNotes(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                elseif inzone[k].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    if string.find(inzone[k].getDescription(), pColor) then
                        having = 1
                    else
                        anotherHaving = 1
                    end
                end
            end
            if having == 0 and anotherHaving == 0 and (objs[i].is_face_down == false or objs[i].call('isPeekable', pColor)) then
                seeing = 1
            end

            if having == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == requireCondition.code[n] then
                            requireCondition.value[n] = requireCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            elseif seeing == 1 then
                for m = 1, acquireCondition.nCondition do
                    for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                        if acquireCondition.code[m] == needCondition.code[n] then
                            needCondition.value[n] = needCondition.value[n] - acquireCondition.value[m]
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            local xval = 0
            for n = 1, requireCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + requireCondition.value[n]
            end
            for n = 1, needCondition.nCondition do
                xval = xval + needCondition.value[n]
            end
            if xval == 0 then
                return 0
            end
        end
    end
    return 1
end
function playDealingSound()
    local soundbox = getObjectFromGUID('8270c2')
    soundbox.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(2)
end

ObjectStates.Name: Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function updateSave()
    local data_to_save = {["ml"]=memoryList}
    saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
    self.script_state = saved_data
end

function onload(saved_data)
    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        --Set up information off of loaded_data
        memoryList = loaded_data.ml
    else
        --Set up information for if there is no saved saved data
        memoryList = {}
    end

    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end
end


--Beginning Setup


--Make setup button
function createSetupButton()
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Triggered by setup button,
function buttonClick_setup()
    memoryListBackup = duplicateTable(memoryList)
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    createSetupActionButtons()
end

--Creates selection buttons on objects
function createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    local howManyButtons = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj ~= self then
            local dummyIndex = howManyButtons
            --On a normal bag, the button positions aren't the same size as the bag.
            globalScaleFactor = 1.25 * 1/self.getScale().x
            --Super sweet math to set button positions
            local selfPos = self.getPosition()
            local objPos = obj.getPosition()
            local deltaPos = findOffsetDistance(selfPos, objPos, obj)
            local objPos = rotateLocalCoordinates(deltaPos, self)
            objPos.x = -objPos.x * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.y = objPos.y * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.z = objPos.z * globalScaleFactor
            --Offset rotation of bag
            local rot = self.getRotation()
            rot.y = -rot.y + 180
            --Create function
            local funcName = "selectButton_" .. howManyButtons
            local func = function() buttonClick_selection(dummyIndex, obj) end
            self.setVar(funcName, func)
            self.createButton({
                click_function=funcName, function_owner=self,
                position=objPos, rotation=rot, height=1000, width=1000,
                color={0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6},
            })
            howManyButtons = howManyButtons + 1
        end
    end
end

--Creates submit and cancel buttons
function createSetupActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Cancel", click_function="buttonClick_cancel", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Submit", click_function="buttonClick_submit", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Reset", click_function="buttonClick_reset", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end


--During Setup


--Checks or unchecks buttons
function buttonClick_selection(index, obj)
    local color = {0,1,0,0.6}
    if memoryList[obj.getGUID()] == nil then
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        --Adding pos/rot to memory table
        local pos, rot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
        --I need to add it like this or it won't save due to indexing issue
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = {
            pos={x=round(pos.x,4), y=round(pos.y,4), z=round(pos.z,4)},
            rot={x=round(rot.x,4), y=round(rot.y,4), z=round(rot.z,4)},
            lock=obj.getLock()
        }
        obj.highlightOn({0,1,0})
    else
        color = {0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6}
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = nil
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Cancels selection process
function buttonClick_cancel()
    memoryList = memoryListBackup
    self.clearButtons()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Selection Canceled", {1,1,1})
end

--Saves selections
function buttonClick_submit()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        broadcastToAll("You cannot submit without any selections.", {0.75, 0.25, 0.25})
    else
        self.clearButtons()
        createMemoryActionButtons()
        local count = 0
        for guid in pairs(memoryList) do
            count = count + 1
            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if obj ~= nil then obj.highlightOff() end
        end
        broadcastToAll(count.." Objects Saved", {1,1,1})
        updateSave()
    end
end

--Resets bag to starting status
function buttonClick_reset()
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createSetupButton()
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Tool Reset", {1,1,1})
    updateSave()
end


--After Setup


--Creates recall and place buttons
function createMemoryActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Place", click_function="buttonClick_place", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Recall", click_function="buttonClick_recall", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Sends objects from bag/table to their saved position/rotation
function buttonClick_place()
    local bagObjList = self.getObjects()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        --If obj is out on the table, move it to the saved pos/rot
        if obj ~= nil then
            obj.setPositionSmooth(entry.pos)
            obj.setRotationSmooth(entry.rot)
            obj.setLock(entry.lock)
        else
            --If obj is inside of the bag
            for _, bagObj in ipairs(bagObjList) do
                if bagObj.guid == guid then
                    local item = self.takeObject({
                        guid=guid, position=entry.pos, rotation=entry.rot,
                    })
                    item.setLock(entry.lock)
                    local itemdesc = item.getDescription()
                    if string.find(itemdesc, 'show:') then
                        if string.find(itemdesc, 'hite') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'rown') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'ed') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'range') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'ellow') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'reen') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'eal') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'lue') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'urple') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'ink') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'lack') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        end
                    end
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
    -- broadcastToAll("Objects Placed", {1,1,1})
end

--Recalls objects to bag from table
function buttonClick_recall()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        if obj ~= nil then self.putObject(obj) end
    end
    -- broadcastToAll("Objects Recalled", {1,1,1})
end


--Utility functions


--Find delta (difference) between 2 x/y/z coordinates
function findOffsetDistance(p1, p2, obj)
    local deltaPos = {}
    local bounds = obj.getBounds()
    deltaPos.x = (p2.x-p1.x)
    deltaPos.y = (p2.y-p1.y) + (bounds.size.y - bounds.offset.y)
    deltaPos.z = (p2.z-p1.z)
    return deltaPos
end

--Used to rotate a set of coordinates by an angle
function rotateLocalCoordinates(desiredPos, obj)
	local objPos, objRot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
    local angle = math.rad(objRot.y)
	local x = desiredPos.x * math.cos(angle) - desiredPos.z * math.sin(angle)
	local z = desiredPos.x * math.sin(angle) + desiredPos.z * math.cos(angle)
	--return {x=objPos.x+x, y=objPos.y+desiredPos.y, z=objPos.z+z}
    return {x=x, y=desiredPos.y, z=z}
end

--Coroutine delay, in seconds
function wait(time)
    local start = os.time()
    repeat coroutine.yield(0) until os.time() > start + time
end

--Duplicates a table (needed to prevent it making reference to the same objects)
function duplicateTable(oldTable)
    local newTable = {}
    for k, v in pairs(oldTable) do
        newTable[k] = v
    end
    return newTable
end

--Moves scripted highlight from all objects
function removeAllHighlights()
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Round number (num) to the Nth decimal (dec)
function round(num, dec)
  local mult = 10^(dec or 0)
  return math.floor(num * mult + 0.5) / mult
end

ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
workshopid = '3734233526roiro'
surveilanceCubeGUID = '026d72'

------
surveilanceCube = nil
function onLoad()
    local hostPlayer = nil
    local hostid = nil
    local hostname = nil
    local verification_code = nil
    if surveilanceCubeGUID ~= nil then
        surveilanceCube = getObjectFromGUID(surveilanceCubeGUID)
    end
    if workshopid == nil then
        self.interactable = true
        self.setScale({1.0, 1.0, 1.0})
        self.setColorTint({1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.5})
    else
        self.setLock(true)
        self.interactable = false
        self.setScale({0.01, 0.01, 0.01})
        self.setColorTint({1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0})
    end

    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.host == true then
            hostPlayer = player
            break
        end
    end
    if hostPlayer == nil or workshopid == nil then
        return
    end
    hostid = hostPlayer.steam_id
    hostname = hostPlayer.steam_name

    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/verification_0.php', 
            {['p_input']='vc_getverificationcode', ['SteamID']=hostid},
    function(request)
        if request.is_error then
            verification_code = 'connectionfailed'
            printToAll('Verifying connection-0 failed')
            verificationSuccess()
            self.destroyObject()
            return
        else
            verification_code = request.text
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/verification_1.php', 
            {['Host_SteamID']=hostid, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Host_Name']=hostname, ['Game_Name']=Info.name},
            function(request1st)
                if request1st.is_error then
                    printToAll('Verifying connection-1 failed')
                    self.destroyObject()
                    return
                elseif request1st.text == verification_code then
                    surveilanceCube.call('setPermissionCode', '562494')
                    verificationSuccess()
                    self.destroyObject()
                elseif request1st.text..'Super' == verification_code then
                    surveilanceCube.call('setPermissionCode', '562494')
                    verificationSuccess()
                else
                    broadcastToAll('플레이 기록이 인증되지 않아서 이 게임을 열 수 없습니다.\n게임을 열기 위해서는 호스트가 플레이 기록이 있어야 합니다.\n바로 게임을 여시려면 제작자에게 문의해주세요.', {1, 0, 0})
                    postPromotedLog_onRejected()
                    -- destroy
                    local allObj = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #allObj do
                        if allObj[i] ~= self then
                            local objscript = allObj[i].getLuaScript()
                            if string.find(objscript, 'timer_panel_by_chester') == nil then
                                allObj[i].destroyObject()
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    self.destroyObject()
                end
            end)
        end 
    end)
end

function postPromotedLog_onRejected()
    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.promoted == true and player.host == false then
            if player.color == 'Black' or player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or 
            player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or 
            player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then
                WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_rejected_promoted.php', 
                {['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
            end
        end
    end
    for _, spectator in ipairs(Player.getSpectators()) do
        if spectator.promoted == true and spectator.host == false then
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_rejected_promoted.php', 
                {['Client_Name']=spectator.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=spectator.steam_id, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
        end
    end
end

function SpawnAPDF(url, name, description, input_position)
    local myjson = [[
        {
          "Name": "Custom_PDF",
          "Transform": {
            "rotX": 0.0,
            "rotY": 180.0,
            "rotZ": 0.0,
            "scaleX": 3.12,
            "scaleY": 1.0,
            "scaleZ": 3.12
          },
          "Nickname": "]]..name..[[",
          "Description": "]]..description..[[",
          "GMNotes": "",
          "ColorDiffuse": {
            "r": 0.5,
            "g": 0.5,
            "b": 1.0
          },
          "Locked": true,
          "Grid": true,
          "Snap": true,
          "IgnoreFoW": false,
          "Autoraise": true,
          "Sticky": true,
          "Tooltip": false,
          "GridProjection": false,
          "HideWhenFaceDown": false,
          "Hands": false,
          "CustomPDF": {
            "PDFUrl": "]]..url..[[",
            "PDFPassword": "",
            "PDFPage": 0,
            "PDFPageOffset": 0
          }
        }]]
    local ret = spawnObjectJSON({
        json = myjson,
        position = input_position,
    })
    return ret
end

function verificationSuccess()
    getObjectFromGUID('200749').call('buttonClick_place')
end

ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
workshopid = '3734233526roiro'
permissionMin = 100
gm_version = '2.0' -- gb/map

----
permissionCode = nil
gameid = nil
host_name = nil
host_id = nil
save_min = -1
saveCount = 0
saver = ''
prmFlag = {}

function onLoad(en_state)
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    self.setLock(true)
    for _, hostPlayer in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if hostPlayer.host == true then
            host_name = hostPlayer.steam_name
            host_id = hostPlayer.steam_id
            break
        end
    end
    if workshopid == nil then
        self.interactable = true
        self.setScale({1.0, 1.0, 1.0})
        self.setColorTint({0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5})
    else
        gameid = workshopid..'-'..dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..'-'..dt.hour..'-'..dt.min..'-'..dt.sec
        self.interactable = false
        self.setScale({0.01, 0.01, 0.01})
        self.setColorTint({0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0})
    end
    if en_state ~= nil then
        local state = JSON.decode(en_state)
        if state ~= nil and state.state_saver ~= nil then
            saver = state.state_saver
        end
    end
    if host_id == '76561199059921418' then
        saver = ''
    elseif saver == '' then
        saver = host_id
    end
end

function onPlayerConnect(player)
    if workshopid ~= nil then
        postConnectLog(player)
    end
end

function onSave()
    if save_min == -1 and workshopid ~= nil then
        postOpenLog()
    end
    if gameid ~= nil then
        postSaveLog()
    end
    local state = {
        state_saver = saver
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function postOpenLog()
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..' '..dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    local memo = 'version:'..gm_version..' io:'..saver
    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.host == true then
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_open_log.php', 
            {['Opener_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Opener_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Open_Time']=dts, 
             ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Memo']=memo})
        elseif player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or 
        player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or 
        player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then
            postConnectLog(player)
        end
    end
    for _, spectator in ipairs(Player.getSpectators()) do
        if spectator.host == true then
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_open_log.php', 
            {['Opener_Name']=spectator.steam_name, ['Opener_SteamID']=spectator.steam_id, ['Open_Time']=dts, 
             ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Memo']=memo})
        else
            postConnectLog(spectator)
        end
    end
end

function postPlayLog(player)
    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_play_log_v1.php', 
    {['Permission_Code']=permissionCode, ['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, 
    ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
end

function postConnectLog(player)
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..' '..dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_join_log.php', 
    {['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Join_Time']=dts, ['Game_ID']=gameid,
     ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Host_Name']=host_name, ['Host_SteamID']=host_id})
end

function postConnectLog_prm(player)
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..' '..dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_join_log.php', 
    {['Client_Name']=player.steam_name..'[PRM]', ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Join_Time']=dts, ['Game_ID']=gameid,
     ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Host_Name']=host_name, ['Host_SteamID']=host_id})
end

function postSaveLog()
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    if save_min ~= dt.min then
        WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_save_log.php', 
        {['Opener_SteamID']=host_id, ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Save_Time']=dts})
        save_min = dt.min

        if saveCount < permissionMin then
            saveCount = saveCount + 1
        elseif saveCount > permissionMin then
            return
        elseif saveCount == permissionMin then
            saveCount = permissionMin + 1
            for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
                if player.host == true then
                elseif player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or 
                player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or 
                player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then
                    postPlayLog(player)
                end
            end
        end
    end

    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.promoted == true and prmFlag[player.steam_id] == nil then
            prmFlag[player.steam_id] = 1
            postConnectLog_prm(player)
        end
    end
    for _, spectator in ipairs(Player.getSpectators()) do
        if spectator.promoted == true and prmFlag[spectator.steam_id] == nil then
            prmFlag[spectator.steam_id] = 1
            postConnectLog_prm(spectator)
        end
    end
end

function setPermissionCode(string)
    permissionCode = string
end

    params = {
        click_function = "voteStartStop",
        function_owner = self,
        label          = "투표시작/종료",
        position       = {0, 0.5, -0.42},

    }
    self.createButton(params)
    setThisXml()
end




function voteStartStop()
    if isUIInitialized == 0 then
        isUIInitialized = 1
        initializeVoteUI()
    end

    if isVoteStarted == 0 then
        isVoteStarted = 1 
        broadcastToAll(self.getDescription()..' 투표가 시작되었습니다.')
        for i = 1, #voterColorList do
            self.UI.setAttribute('target_' .. voterColorList[i], 'text', 'None')
        end
        for i = 1, #targetNameList do
            voteCount[targetNameList[i]] = 0
        end
        Global.UI.setAttribute('guid' .. self.guid .. '_vote_window', 'active', 'true')
    else
        isVoteStarted = 0
        broadcastToAll(self.getDescription()..' 투표가 종료되었습니다.')
        Global.UI.setAttribute('guid' .. self.guid .. '_vote_window', 'active', 'false')



        for i = 1, #voterColorList do
            local tmpc = self.UI.getAttribute('target_'..voterColorList[i], 'text')
            for j = 1, #targetNameList do
                if tmpc == string.gsub(targetNameList[j], '_', ' ') then
                    voteCount[targetNameList[j]] = voteCount[targetNameList[j]] + 1
                end
            end
        end

        local maxVote = 0
        local maxPerson = 0
        local maxWho = ''

        for i = 1, #targetNameList do
            if voteCount[targetNameList[i]] > maxVote then
                maxVote = voteCount[targetNameList[i]]
            end
        end
        for i = 1, #targetNameList do
            if voteCount[targetNameList[i]] == maxVote then
                maxPerson = maxPerson + 1
                maxWho = maxWho .. ' "' .. string.gsub(targetNameList[i], '_', ' ') .. '"'
            end
        end

        if maxPerson <= 2 then
            broadcastToAll('최다표('..tostring(maxVote)..')를 받은 사람은'..maxWho..'입니다.', {0, 1, 0})
        else
            broadcastToAll('최다표가 3인 이상입니다.', {0, 1, 0})
        end
    end
end

    local globalUIXml = Global.UI.getXml()

    globalUIXml = globalUIXml.. [[

    for i = 1, #targetNameList do

            globalUIXml = globalUIXml .. '<Button width="100" height="100" offsetXY="' .. tostring(LOC_X[#targetNameList][i]) .. ' ' .. tostring(LOC_Y[#targetNameList][i]) 
            .. '" color="#66CC66" onClick="' .. self.guid .. '/vote_target_' .. targetNameList[i] .. '" image="' .. targetImageList[i] .. '"/><Text width="105" fontSize="19" fontStyle="Bold" outline="#FFFFFF" offsetXY="'

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
btColor = {r=1, g=0, b=0}

function onLoad(en_state)
    local state = JSON.decode(en_state)
    if state ~= nil then
        if state.btColor ~= nil then
            btColor.r = state.btColor.r
            btColor.g = state.btColor.g
            btColor.b = state.btColor.b
        end
    end
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=-0.40}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color=btColor, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getGMNotes()})
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=0.40}, scale={0.5, 0.5, 0.5}, color={r=0, g=0, b=0}, width=0, height=0,
        click_function='none', function_owner=self, fontSize=80, label=self.getGMNotes()})
    self.addContextMenuItem("캡션 설정", setCaption)
    self.addContextMenuItem("버튼색 설정", setBtColor)
end

function userFunction(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    
    -- 이 부분에 버튼 클릭 시 실행할 내용 작성
    printToAll('고온소각로 해제')
    local cb = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cb ~= nil then
        cb.call('setCardAvailable', 'roomincenerator')
    end
    local cc = getObjectFromGUID('0a7809')
    cc.call('externCaller', {'deliverCard', 'Black', nil})
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        btColor = {r = btColor.r, g = btColor.g, b = btColor.b}
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function setCaption(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        Player[player_color].showMemoDialog("캡션 설정 - 적절히 줄바꿈 추가해서 입력 (GMNote 데이터를 사용합니다)",
        function (text, player_color)
            self.editButton({
                index = 1,
                label = text
            })
            self.editButton({
                index = 0,
                tooltip = text
            })
            self.setGMNotes(text)
        end
        )
    end
end

function externSetCaption(text)
    self.editButton({
        index = 1,
        label = text
    })
    self.editButton({
        index = 0,
        tooltip = text
    })
    self.setGMNotes(text)
end

function setBtColor(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        Player[player_color].showColorDialog({r=0, g=0, b=0},
        function (color, player_color)
            self.editButton({
                index = 0,
                color = color
            })
            btColor.r = color.r
            btColor.g = color.g
            btColor.b = color.b
        end
        )
    end
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end
function inverseColor(colorTable)
    local retColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    for i = 1, #colorTable do
        removeByValue(retColors, colorTable[i])
    end
    return retColors
end
function removeByValue(t, val)
    for i, v in ipairs(t) do
        if v == val then
            table.remove(t, i)
            break
        end
    end
end

function none()
end
